notes: HPE OneView configuration. Module name format is HPEOneView.<major><minor> for OneView <major>.<minor> library (e.g., HPEOneView.1000 for OneView 10.00). See https://github.com/HewlettPackard/POSH-HPEOneView. Appliance/credentials are EXAMPLE values used for tests; in production supply -OneViewHost / -OneViewUser / -OneViewPassword (or env vars ONEVIEW_USER / ONEVIEW_PASSWORD) at runtime.
